title: Hezbollah Opens Northern Front
detail: Hezbollah fires 6 projectiles at Israeli base near Haifa — first attack since Nov 2024 ceasefire. Israel responds with massive strikes on Beirut's Dahiyeh suburb, killing Hezbollah intel chief Makled. 52 killed, 154 wounded in Lebanon.

title: Niloofar Square Civilian Deaths
detail: Airstrike on Niloofar Square in central Tehran kills 20 civilians. Pentagon claims IRGC command node beneath square. Iran broadcasts footage of dead children. Amnesty International calls for independent investigation.

title: Saudi Arabia Drawn Into Conflict
detail: Iranian missiles hit Ras Tanura refinery (fire contained) and target Prince Sultan Air Base (intercepted). Saudi Arabia activates mutual defense pact with US. Riyadh closes airspace.
